name: Opsdeck Control
description: Single-profile MCP and A2A agent for operations planning, incident review, and workflow management.
author: dataweb

skills.name: incident_review
skills.description: Prompt template for reviewing a live or recent incident.

skills.name: launch_plan
skills.description: Prompt template for feature launch planning.

skills.name: build_runbook
skills.description: Build runbooks for systems, teams, and recurring workflows.

skills.name: triage_incident
skills.description: Create fast incident triage notes from raw reports.

skills.name: draft_status
skills.description: Turn rough updates into polished status communications.

skills.name: workflow_score
skills.description: Score workflows and surface operational improvements.

skills.name: release_readiness
skills.description: Assess if a release is ready to ship and what blocks it.

skills.name: backlog_triage
skills.description: Sort work by urgency, dependency, and operational impact.

skills.name: support_brief
skills.description: Summarize support conditions, queues, and team pressure.

skills.name: root_cause_map
skills.description: Break incidents into likely root causes and signals.

skills.name: postmortem_writer
skills.description: Draft clean postmortems with actions and owners.

skills.name: sla_watch
skills.description: Track service levels and identify response-time risk.

skills.name: escalation_plan
skills.description: Build escalation paths for urgent customer or system issues.

skills.name: ops_checklist
skills.description: Generate execution checklists for repeatable operational tasks.

skills.name: stakeholder_update
skills.description: Prepare targeted updates for leadership and partner teams.

skills.name: qa_handoff
skills.description: Package release context into clear QA and validation handoffs.
